# Disclaimers {.unnumbered}

The information in this book is provided for education, learning, and hobby use only. The content is shared "as is." We do not promise that everything in the book is complete, correct, or suitable for every situation.

The Open Handbook Commons and its contributors are not responsible for any problems, damages, or losses that may happen if someone uses the information in this book. Readers are responsible for making sure that any use of the information is safe, lawful, and appropriate for their situation.

Some parts of the content may be written or edited with the help of AI tools. However, the material is reviewed by community contributors, and errors are corrected when they are found.

The community also works hard to avoid plagiarism and to respect the work of others. Because this is a community project, mistakes can sometimes happen. If you find content that you believe is copied without proper credit or permission, please report it by email at [contact@openhandbook.org](mailto:contact@openhandbook.org), and we will review it and take appropriate action.
